responses.summary: Added strict semver gate SEMVER_RE='^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$' at hooks/instructions-loaded-check.sh:43. Cache content now validated before assignment: [[ "$CACHE_CONTENT" =~ $SEMVER_RE ]] at line ~59. 'junk', whitespace, and non-version strings are rejected and the hook falls through to npm. INSTALLED_VERSION is also gated (line 45) to suppress nudge entirely on corrupt SDLC.md.

Same SEMVER_RE applied to npm result at hooks/instructions-loaded-check.sh:~68. NPM_RESULT=$(npm view ...) is captured into a scratch var, validated against semver, and only assigned to LATEST_VERSION + persisted to cache if it passes. '1.alpha.0' never reaches the awk-based delta math.

responses.finding: Regression coverage for malformed cache / non-numeric versions
responses.summary: Three new tests in tests/test-hooks.sh: test_update_notification_rejects_malformed_cache_junk, test_update_notification_rejects_malformed_cache_whitespace, test_update_notification_rejects_non_numeric_minor. Full suite: 84/84 pass. Negative control confirmed: reverting the semver gates to '[ -n ... ]' makes all three tests fail.
